content.problemStatement:
Let us learn and practice recursion for simple problems.\
Write a code to calculate and output the sum of the first $N$ natural numbers.
content.inputFormat:
- First line will contain $T$, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
- Each testcase contains of a single line of input, three integers $D, L, R$.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one string - "Too Early" (without quotes) if it's too early to take the vaccine, "Too Late" (without quotes) if it's too late to take the vaccine, "Take second dose now" (without quotes) if it's the correct time to take the vaccine.
